message:
refactor(tests,benches): cleanup and improved test coverage

Benchmark improvements (cancel_trace_bench.rs):
- Replace manual seq counter with enumerate() for idiomatic iteration
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] to complex bench function
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on params (already Copy)

E2E distributed tests (e2e_distributed.rs):
- Minor formatting adjustments

Topology benchmark (topology_benchmark.rs):
- Comprehensive refactoring for cleaner test organization
- Improved benchmark result tracking and assertions

New conformance tests (raptorq_conformance.rs):
- Add dedicated conformance test file for RaptorQ determinism

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
